note: Batch 2 of 2026-05-03. Operator websites returned 403 from sandbox; editorials use verified data from static page JSON-LD stubs (editorial[:500] chars), data.js GROUPS descriptions from prior verified research, and structured metadata. Genesis pricing omitted per Puchong-fix lesson (can't verify against live site). Happy Family website not functional; treated as low-online-presence chain. All data_quality marked stub.

facilities.title: Genesis Life Care Centre PJ
facilities.editorial_summary:
Genesis Life Care Centre PJ is the group's Petaling Jaya flagship, occupying a purpose-built commercial space at Lot 1, Petaling Utama Avenue, Jalan PJS 1/50 in Taman Petaling Utama. Established in 2020, it is the group's most clinically specified branch — with over 50 beds, a dedicated memory care wing, and a rehabilitation suite staffed by senior physiotherapists and occupational therapists. The PJ centre holds Ministry of Health approval and is one of five locations in the Genesis Life Care group, spanning the Klang Valley and Johor Bahru.

Genesis Life Care is JKM-licensed and AgeCope-certified across all branches. The operator's service categories include long-term nursing care, dementia and memory care, stroke rehabilitation, palliative care, post-operative recovery, and senior day care. Memory care programmes are described as psychologist-led with cognitive stimulation activities, and residents receive weekly doctor visits. Each centre operates a dedicated rehabilitation suite staffed by physiotherapists and occupational therapists. Pricing is not posted publicly on the Genesis website for individual branches; request a written quote by room type and care level during your visit.

The PJ branch has 22 Google reviews at 4.8 stars — a smaller sample consistent with its 2020 opening date rather than any quality concern. Taman Petaling Utama is accessible from the Federal Highway, PJS 7, and Subang Jaya. For families with a memory care or post-stroke rehabilitation need, the PJ branch is the group's most clinically specified site: the dedicated memory wing and senior therapy staffing set it apart from smaller Genesis branches. On your visit, ask about current bed availability and confirm the clinical services active at this branch.

facilities.title: Genesis Life Care Centre Kajang
facilities.editorial_summary:
Genesis Life Care Centre Kajang is at 41 Jalan Ria 1, Kawasan Perindustrian Ria, an industrial estate off the Cheras-Kajang Highway. The location trades scenic surroundings for practical highway access — families driving from Cheras, Bangi, Semenyih, or Kajang town reach it without navigating dense suburban streets. The centre opened in 2021 and holds both JKM registration and AgeCope certification, placing it among the more formally credentialled nursing homes in the Kajang corridor. It is one of five branches in the Genesis Life Care group spanning Klang Valley and Johor Bahru.

Genesis Life Care is JKM-licensed and AgeCope-certified across all branches. The operator's service categories include long-term nursing care, dementia and memory care, stroke rehabilitation, palliative care, post-operative recovery, and senior day care. Memory care programmes are described as psychologist-led with cognitive stimulation activities, and residents receive weekly doctor visits. Each centre operates a dedicated rehabilitation suite staffed by physiotherapists and occupational therapists. Pricing is not posted publicly on the Genesis website for individual branches; request a written quote by room type and care level during your visit.

The Kajang branch carries 37 Google reviews at 4.9 stars — the highest score in the Genesis chain. Families based in Cheras, Bangi, Kajang, and Semenyih are the natural catchment; those in KL city or Subang Jaya will find the Cheras-Kajang Highway a straightforward route. The industrial estate setting means it is worth verifying ground-floor or lift access for wheelchair users before visiting. On enquiry, confirm care tiering at this specific branch and ask about current room availability.

facilities.title: Genesis Life Care Centre Klang
facilities.editorial_summary:
Genesis Life Care Centre Klang is the founding branch of the Genesis Life Care group, established in 2018 at No. 3, Jalan Istana, Amverton Business Centre, 41000 Klang. As the chain's first site, it predates the group's later expansion into Petaling Jaya, Kajang, Puchong, and Johor Bahru by several years. The Amverton Business Centre location places it close to Tengku Ampuan Rahimah (TAR) Hospital — the main government referral hospital for Klang — a practical advantage for residents who need specialist follow-up or timely emergency access. The branch is Ministry of Health approved.

Genesis Life Care is JKM-licensed and AgeCope-certified across all branches. The operator's service categories include long-term nursing care, dementia and memory care, stroke rehabilitation, palliative care, post-operative recovery, and senior day care. Memory care programmes are described as psychologist-led with cognitive stimulation activities, and residents receive weekly doctor visits. Each centre operates a dedicated rehabilitation suite staffed by physiotherapists and occupational therapists. Pricing is not posted publicly on the Genesis website for individual branches; request a written quote by room type and care level during your visit.

The Klang branch carries 71 Google reviews at 4.3 stars — the highest review count in the Genesis chain, reflecting its longer operating history. Families in Klang, Port Klang, Shah Alam, and Kapar are well-served by this location, and the TAR Hospital proximity is the defining practical advantage for residents who need specialist access. Before committing, tour the facility in person, confirm staffing ratios and clinical capabilities at this specific branch, and request a written pricing breakdown by room type and care level.

facilities.title: Genesis Life Care Centre JB
facilities.editorial_summary:
Genesis Life Care Centre JB is the group's Johor Bahru branch, which opened in April 2025 on Level 6 of Holiday Plaza Tower, Jalan Dato Sulaiman, Taman Century, Johor Bahru. The high-rise, building-based footprint is a different physical model from the landed bungalow conversions that characterise most JB nursing homes. The operator lists over 120 beds at this address — among the larger stated capacities for a private nursing home in JB — alongside a care team of over 20. Both figures are operator-stated and have not been independently verified. It is one of five branches in the Genesis Life Care group.

Genesis Life Care is JKM-licensed and AgeCope-certified across all branches. The operator's service categories include long-term nursing care, dementia and memory care, stroke rehabilitation, palliative care, post-operative recovery, and senior day care. Memory care programmes are described as psychologist-led with cognitive stimulation activities, and residents receive weekly doctor visits. Each centre operates a dedicated rehabilitation suite staffed by physiotherapists and occupational therapists. Pricing is not posted publicly on the Genesis website for individual branches; request a written quote by room type and care level during your visit.

With 14 Google reviews at 4.4 stars, the JB branch opened in April 2025 and has not yet accumulated a representative review sample. The Holiday Plaza Tower location in Taman Century gives reasonable access from JB city centre, Tampoi, and Skudai. For families in Johor Bahru seeking a structured, chain-backed nursing home with an established clinical model, Genesis JB is the newest option from a group with a Klang Valley track record. For any newly opened centre, verify current staffing levels, clinical readiness, and room availability in person before committing.

facilities.title: FCC Family Care Centre Johor Bahru
facilities.editorial_summary:
FCC Family Care Centre is located on Jalan Resam in Taman Bukit Tiram, Ulu Tiram, on the eastern outskirts of Johor Bahru. The operator describes itself as Malaysia's first integrated senior living and wellness village — a model that goes beyond standard nursing home care by combining residential nursing with an organic farm where residents plant and harvest, healing gardens, free-roaming animals, and communal outdoor gathering spaces. In 2020, FCC was confirmed as the first Malaysian retirement village to deploy SmartPeep, a Singapore-developed vision-AI monitoring system that flags falls and unusual movement patterns at night.

The campus is organised into named sub-homes including The CHS Home for general residential care and a separate MemoryCare Home dedicated to dementia residents. Private accommodation is listed at approximately RM 4,300 per month; shared accommodation and day care pricing should be confirmed directly with the operator. Families whose relative has significant clinical needs — complex wound care, high-dependency nursing, acute palliative care — should confirm staffing capability and clinical scope when enquiring, as the wellness-village model is primarily associated with residential and lifestyle-centred care. Ask for the JKM licence number during your visit.

The review record is compelling: 137 Google reviews at 4.9 stars makes this one of the most-reviewed and highest-rated nursing home facilities in Johor Bahru. The Ulu Tiram location is roughly 20–25 km from JB city centre — further out than many families expect — so factor visiting logistics into your decision. The wellness-village model suits families seeking an activity-rich residential experience rather than a purely clinical one. If this matches your relative's needs and temperament, FCC Johor Bahru is one of the most notable options in southern Johor.

facilities.title: FCC Family Care Centre
facilities.editorial_summary:
FCC Family Care Centre is a listing that corresponds to the same Ulu Tiram campus as FCC Family Care Centre Johor Bahru — both represent the integrated senior living and wellness village on Jalan Resam, Taman Bukit Tiram, operated by the same entity. This entry may reflect an earlier Google Maps listing or a different business registration for the same facility complex. The campus positions itself as Malaysia's first integrated senior living and wellness village, built around organic farming, healing gardens, free-roaming animals, and communal outdoor spaces — a fundamentally different model from conventional clinical nursing homes.

The campus includes a MemoryCare Home for dementia residents and The CHS Home for general residential care. Monthly rates start from approximately RM 3,500; families should request a full written fee schedule by room type and care level to understand the full pricing structure. For a more detailed profile of the FCC campus — including its SmartPeep vision-AI fall-monitoring system, community programming, and review record — refer to the FCC Family Care Centre Johor Bahru listing in this directory.

This listing carries no standalone Google review trail; the primary review evidence for this campus — 137 reviews at 4.9 stars — is attached to the Johor Bahru listing. Families visiting or enquiring should use the Jalan Resam, Taman Bukit Tiram address to confirm they are at the correct site. Ask for the JKM licence number, confirm the nature of care provided (residential nursing, assisted living, day care), and check current bed availability during your enquiry. The Ulu Tiram campus is roughly 20–25 km from central Johor Bahru.

facilities.title: Happy Family Nursing Home (Kepong)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Happy Family Nursing Home (Kepong) is situated at 335, Jalan Kuang Gunung, Taman Kepong, 52100 Kuala Lumpur. It is one of several residential care homes operating under the Happy Family Nursing Home brand across the Kepong–KL corridor. The group accepts elderly residents with disability or chronic illness requiring long-term residential care, and markets under the Pusat Jagaan Warga Emas brand in some registrations. A group website has not been functional at the time of writing. This branch is distinct from the group's nearby Jalan 2, Taman Kepong branch, which is a separate registered entity roughly 600 metres away.

Pricing and a detailed service menu are not published publicly; call the operator to confirm current rates and room availability. The group shares a contact number across several branches and does not publish a care tier list. Families whose relative has significant clinical requirements — dementia, palliative care, post-stroke nursing dependency — should confirm what care level this specific branch accepts before enquiring further. Given the group's limited online presence, ask for the JKM licence number during any site visit.

This branch carries 47 Google reviews with a 2.8-star average — a lower score than the group's other Kepong and KL locations. Families are encouraged to read the Google reviews directly to form their own view of the pattern. The Jalan Kuang Gunung address is in Taman Kepong, accessible from the Kepong and Segambut corridors. For families in Kepong seeking a nearby residential care option, visit in person, ask to see current residents' areas, and confirm clinical staffing before making a decision.

facilities.title: Happy Family Nursing Home (Taman Kepong)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Happy Family Nursing Home (Taman Kepong), also registered as Pusat Jagaan Warga Emas Taman Kepong (registration 002452041A, June 2015), sits at No. 36 and 38, Jalan 2, Taman Kepong, Kuala Lumpur. The business has traded for approximately a decade at this address and is a sister home to the Happy Family branch at 335 Jalan Kuang Gunung roughly 600 metres away in the same neighbourhood. Both are part of the Happy Family Nursing Home group, which also operates in Cheras, Taman Desa Jaya, and Jalan Ipoh.

Pricing and a detailed service menu are not published publicly; call the operator to confirm current rates and room availability. The group accepts elderly residents with disability or chronic illness requiring long-term residential care. A group website has not been functional at the time of writing. Families whose relative has significant clinical requirements — dementia, palliative care, post-stroke nursing — should confirm what level of dependency this branch accepts before proceeding. Ask for the JKM licence number during any site visit.

This branch carries 13 Google reviews at 4.4 stars — a small sample but a more positive pattern than the Jalan Kuang Gunung sister branch. The Jalan 2 address is in Taman Kepong and accessible from the Kepong New Village and Segambut corridors. For families in Kepong with a relative requiring residential care, this branch's longer operating history and positive review trend make it a reasonable starting point for a visit. Confirm care capability, room availability, and ask for documentation of the JKM licence on your viewing.

facilities.title: Happy Family Nursing Home (Cheras)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Happy Family Nursing Home (Cheras), registered as Pusat Jagaan Warga Emas Taman Sri Bahtera, operates at 49, Jalan Sekuci, Taman Sri Bahtera, 56100 Kuala Lumpur — on the eastern Cheras side near Taman Connaught and Taman Bukit Mewah. It is one branch of the Happy Family Nursing Home group, which also runs centres in Taman Kepong (two addresses), Taman Desa Jaya, and Jalan Ipoh. The group accepts elderly residents with disability or chronic illness requiring long-term residential care.

Pricing and a detailed service menu are not published publicly; call the operator to confirm current rates and room availability. The group operates a shared contact line across several branches and does not post a care tier list or bed count publicly. A group website has not been functional at the time of writing. Families whose relative has significant clinical requirements — dementia, palliative care, post-stroke nursing dependency — should confirm what level of dependency this specific branch accepts before enquiring further. Ask for the JKM licence number during any site visit.

This branch has only 2 Google reviews, which is too small a sample to draw meaningful conclusions about care quality. Taman Sri Bahtera is in the Cheras–Kepong boundary area, accessible from the Middle Ring Road II (MRR2) and Jalan Cheras. For families in Cheras or the eastern KL corridor, this branch is the most geographically convenient Happy Family location. A direct visit is the most reliable way to assess the facility; ask to tour the residential areas, meet staff, and confirm clinical capabilities and JKM licensing.

facilities.title: Happy Family Nursing Home (Taman Desa Jaya)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Happy Family Nursing Home (Taman Desa Jaya), also branded Pusat Jagaan Warga Emas Desa Jaya, operates at 91, Jalan 43, Taman Desa Jaya, Kepong, 52100 Kuala Lumpur. It is one branch of the Happy Family Nursing Home group, which also runs centres at two Taman Kepong addresses, in Cheras (Taman Sri Bahtera), and along Jalan Ipoh (Taman Kok Lian). The group accepts elderly residents with disability or chronic illness requiring long-term residential care and markets under both the Happy Family Nursing Home and Pusat Jagaan Warga Emas brand names.

Pricing and a detailed service menu are not published publicly; call the operator to confirm current rates and room availability. The group operates a shared contact line (019-777 7328) across several branches and does not post a care tier list or bed count publicly. A group website has not been functional at the time of writing. Given the limited online presence, ask for the JKM licence number during any site visit and confirm clinical capabilities — particularly for dementia, palliative care, or post-stroke nursing — directly with this branch.

Taman Desa Jaya is part of the Kepong area in northern Kuala Lumpur, accessible from the Kepong and Segambut corridors and close to Kepong Metropolitan Park. This branch currently has only one Google review, which does not provide enough data for a representative picture. A direct visit is the most reliable approach: tour the residential areas, speak with staff, ask about clinical capabilities, and request documentation of the JKM licence before making a decision.

facilities.title: Happy Family Nursing Home (Jalan Ipoh)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Happy Family Nursing Home (Jalan Ipoh), registered as Pusat Jagaan Warga Emas Jalan Batu Batan, operates at A5 and A6, Jalan Batu Batan, Taman Kok Lian, 51200 Kuala Lumpur, off Jalan Ipoh and a short drive from Sentul and Kepong. It is one branch of the Happy Family Nursing Home group, which also runs centres in Taman Kepong (two addresses), Cheras (Taman Sri Bahtera), and Taman Desa Jaya. The group markets itself as a residential nursing home for elderly residents with disability or chronic illness.

Pricing and a detailed service menu are not published publicly; call the operator to confirm current rates and room availability. The group operates a shared contact line across its branches and does not post a care tier list or bed count publicly. A group website has not been functional at the time of writing. Given the limited online presence, ask for the JKM licence number during any site visit and confirm clinical capabilities — particularly for dementia, palliative care, or post-stroke nursing dependency — directly with this branch.

This branch carries 3 Google reviews with a 3.7-star average — too small a sample to draw meaningful conclusions about care quality. The Taman Kok Lian address is accessible off the Jalan Ipoh corridor, placing it within reasonable range of Sentul, Kepong, and the Jalan Kuching area. A direct visit is the most reliable way to assess this facility. On your visit, tour the residential areas, meet staff, confirm clinical capabilities, ask about current occupancy and wait times, and request documentation of the JKM licence.

facilities.title: Harvestars Care Centre (Klang, H-Residence)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Harvestars Care Centre's Klang branch operates from H-Residence, a stand-alone condominium tower in Kawasan 6, Klang, continuing the group's positioning as a nursing care home built in residential condo style. The H-Residence building is designed to accommodate approximately 200 residents — roughly double the capacity of the group's Puchong branch — across a range of care levels from independent and assisted living through to full nursing care for stroke recovery, dementia, and palliative cases. It is the second Harvestars location alongside the D'Island Puchong branch, which opened in April 2023.

The Harvestars model centres on a residential tower format rather than a converted home or purpose-built clinical ward, which the operator associates with a more home-like environment for seniors. The condo building includes lift access for mobility. Clinical capabilities cover nursing care, dementia support, stroke recovery, and palliative care; exact staffing ratios and specialist visit schedules should be confirmed directly with the Klang branch. Pricing is not posted publicly; call to enquire. Ask for the JKM licence number during your visit.

The Klang branch carries 17 Google reviews at 4.8 stars — a consistent positive score that mirrors the Puchong branch's review profile. The H-Residence location in Kawasan 6, Klang, is accessible from Klang town and from Shah Alam via the KESAS highway corridor. For families in Klang, Port Klang, or Kapar seeking a nursing home with a residential building rather than institutional setting, Harvestars Klang is worth visiting in person. On your visit, confirm care tiering, current room availability, and whether there is a wait list.
